scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @limor/api & npm run dev -w web
scripts.build: npm -w apps/api run build && npm -w apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/api run lint --if-present && npm -w apps/web run lint --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm -w apps/api run typecheck --if-present && npm -w apps/web run typecheck --if-present
